summary: Marketplace guarantor purchase integration fully tested. All features working correctly: product page shows two purchase options (instant and guarantor), 3% guarantor commission correctly calculated, guarantor purchases create orders with pending_confirmation status, buyer can confirm/cancel/dispute, after confirmation product is delivered and seller receives payment.
passed_tests: Backend: Login as trader2 - SUCCESS
Backend: Login as trader - SUCCESS
Backend: Get commission settings (guarantor_commission_percent=3%, auto_complete_days=3) - SUCCESS
Backend: Get product details - SUCCESS
Backend: Get marketplace products list - SUCCESS
Backend: Instant purchase flow - SUCCESS
Backend: Guarantor purchase creates order with pending_confirmation status - SUCCESS
Backend: My purchases endpoint returns correct data - SUCCESS
Backend: Confirm guarantor purchase releases escrow and delivers product - SUCCESS
Backend: Cancel guarantor purchase refunds buyer - SUCCESS
Backend: Open dispute changes status to disputed - SUCCESS
Backend: Admin resolve dispute - SUCCESS
Backend: Guarantor fee calculation (3% of product price) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Product page shows two purchase options - SUCCESS
Frontend: Instant option shows base price (10.00 USDT) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Guarantor option shows price + fee (10.30 USDT = 10.00 + 0.30) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Guarantor info box explains how protection works - SUCCESS
Frontend: Price summary shows breakdown (product price, guarantor fee, total) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Buy button updates to show correct total - SUCCESS
Frontend: Guarantor purchase shows success toast with auto-complete date - SUCCESS
Frontend: My Purchases shows pending order with action buttons - SUCCESS
Frontend: Pending order shows 'Подтвердить получение' (Confirm receipt) button - SUCCESS
Frontend: Pending order shows cancel button (X icon) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Pending order shows 'Открыть спор' (Open dispute) link - SUCCESS
Frontend: Pending order shows auto-complete date warning - SUCCESS
Frontend: Confirm receipt delivers product and shows content - SUCCESS
Frontend: Order status changes to 'Завершено' (Completed) after confirmation - SUCCESS
Frontend: Completed orders show 'Показать товар' (Show product) button - SUCCESS
seed_data_creation: Created multiple guarantor purchases during testing. One confirmed, one cancelled, one disputed and resolved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Marketplace guarantor purchase flow fully tested and working. Key endpoints: POST /api/marketplace/products/{id}/buy?purchase_type=guarantor, POST /api/marketplace/purchases/{id}/confirm, POST /api/marketplace/purchases/{id}/cancel, POST /api/marketplace/purchases/{id}/dispute. Frontend components: ProductPage.js (lines 262-322 for purchase type selection), TraderDashboard.js MyMarketPurchases (lines 2019-2093) and PurchaseCard (lines 2096-2364) for order management. Guarantor commission is 3%, auto-complete is 3 days.
